description: Perform a molecular phylogenetic analysis of the wood mouse cytochrome b dataset using the 'ape' package in RStudio. Calculate a genetic distance matrix using the Kimura 2-parameter (K80) model and construct a Neighbor-Joining (NJ) phylogenetic tree rooted with specimen 'No305' as the outgroup. Conduct a bootstrap analysis with 100 replicates to evaluate node support. Save the distance matrix to /home/ga/RProjects/output/woodmouse_dist.csv, the rooted tree topology to /home/ga/RProjects/output/woodmouse_tree.nwk, and a visualization of the rooted tree with bootstrap values to /home/ga/RProjects/output/woodmouse_tree_plot.png. Execute all code in /home/ga/RProjects/woodmouse_phylogeny.R.
